commands.notes: 62 tests pass (56 existing + 6 new staff-orders hermetic integration tests). Covers AC-2 branch isolation on list, AC-3 non-terminal filter, AC-4 detail item+selectedOptions shape, AC-5 cross-branch detail → exactly 403, unassigned-staff → 403 on list, empty-branch → 200 empty array.
All 5 packages green (types, utils, api, ui, mobile) including the new Expo typed route order-detail/[orderId].
0 errors across all packages. Only pre-existing warnings in apps/mobile/scripts/dev-with-tunnel.mjs (not in STAFF-002 blast radius).
All matched files use Prettier code style after formatting the touched files.

Idempotent: 5 sample orders seeded on both consecutive runs (fixed order_numbers + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING + delete-then-reinsert items). Real product_id UUID derived from productIdBySlug (FK NOT NULL honored).

manualChecks.check: AC-5 cross-branch detail access asserts EXACTLY 403 (not 403-or-404)
manualChecks.notes: D5 test asserts res.status === 403 for a branch-2 order id requested by branch-1 staff — deterministic, matches route A2 step 3 which returns 403 for branch mismatch (order exists but is out of scope).

manualChecks.check: No client-supplied branch id is honored on either endpoint
manualChecks.notes: Both handlers derive branchId only from resolveBranchScope(db, userId). No branch id is read from req.query, req.params, or req.body. Cross-branch reads are structurally impossible.

manualChecks.check: req.staffSession.assignedBranchId (documented stale) is never used for scoping
manualChecks.notes: Grep confirms staff.ts references resolveBranchScope only; the stale session field is not read in either new handler.

manualChecks.check: No status-change WRITE endpoint or side-effecting onPress introduced (STAFF-003 boundary)
manualChecks.notes: Both routes are GET only. Detail-screen action buttons are inert (onPress = no-op with // STAFF-003 comment).
orders/order_items tables and orders_branch_status_idx pre-exist. git status shows no new migration file.
